scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @wedding/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter api build && corepack pnpm --filter web build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @wedding/shared lint && corepack pnpm --filter api lint && corepack pnpm --filter web lint
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @wedding/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter web typecheck
scripts.format: corepack pnpm --filter @wedding/shared format && corepack pnpm --filter api format && corepack pnpm --filter web format
